title: Rich French Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with tender beef, rich flavors, and a hint of peppercorn. This dish is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: 1. Heat the lardons in a Dutch oven over medium heat until crispy.
2. Remove the lardons and set aside.
3. Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
4. Add the onion, carrot, Russian peppercorns, thyme, and salt to the pot.
5. Cook for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
6. Add the red wine to the pot, stirring to deglaze.
7. Add the beef broth, tomato paste, and browned lardons to the pot.
8. Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2 hours.
9. Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
